description.ko: 생물학적 조화를 매크로 시점으로 탐구하여, 생체 발광 막과 유체 혈관 네트워크를 통한 영양분의 리드미컬한 교환을 포착합니다.
description.en: A macro exploration of biological harmony, capturing the rhythmic exchange of nutrients through bioluminescent membranes and fluid vascular networks.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Osmotic Equilibrium.' A macro perspective of a complex, pulsating cellular network where #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes form semi-permeable chambers. Deep #2D5A3D dark forest vascular structures anchor the entity within a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Swirling ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar flow through the capillary systems like liquid light. Macro cinematography focus on the rhythmic expansion and the glowing exchange of nutrients. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene and divine biological movement.
